name: dimly lit rock room
description: I'm in a dimly lit rock room
hints: A dimly lit room carved from rock, between the metal tunnels and deeper chambers.
This connects the alien tunnels to the alien machinery room to the south.
S leads to the alien machinery room. W goes back to the metal tunnel.
S=rock room with alien machinery (24). W=metal tunnel (22).
notes: Dimly lit rock room connector. S=alien machinery room (24). W=metal tunnel (22).
